difference: raws shows flat command list; AWS CLI shows man-page style with service description, usage, and formatted help

raws sends request with null params (server-side error, exit 254); AWS CLI validates required --kms-key-id client-side (exit 252). CRITICAL: raws does not serialize any CLI parameters into the JSON request body for CloudWatch Logs.
